mainVideo.description: Range video: RAV meditation → floor ecstatic → Denver stages

meta.positioning: Ceremonial Electronics - From Stillness to Movement

emails.subject: House of Mantra - Ceremonial Electronics Live
emails.body:
Ciao Rebecca,

Sono FLUTUR. Creo 'ceremonial electronics' - sound journey che partono dal silenzio del RAV Vast e costruiscono layer su layer fino a frequenze che muovono il corpo. Dal meditativo all'estatico, live.

Ho visto House of Mantra e la vostra visione di unire yoga, meditazione e musica come esperienza trasformativa - è esattamente il mio territorio.

Background:
- Main stage Drishti Beats Festival 2023 (Aspen, Colorado) - invitato da IHF dopo opening a Denver
- 4 anni di sunset ceremonies a Villa Porta, Lago Maggiore
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- Collab con Equanimous (Gravitas Recordings, 100M+ streams)

Il mio setup: RAV Vast + voce + chitarra + Ableton Push. Posso creare un arco completo - dalla meditazione al movimento.

→ Video (meditation → ecstatic): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rmnShcDsBBY
→ RAV meditation session (8K+ views): https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Mi piacerebbe creare qualcosa insieme per House of Mantra.

FLUTUR

emails.subject: RAV Vast Live - Opening/Cooldown/Full Journey
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, a RAV Vast endorsed artist creating 'ceremonial electronics' - live sound journeys from meditative stillness to ecstatic movement.

I'm interested in contributing to ED Berlin in any format:
- Cooldown/integration: Gentle RAV Vast sound healing (15-20 min)
- Opening warmup: Building from stillness (15-20 min)
- Full journey: Complete arc from meditation to melodic deep (45-60 min)

Background:
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE (Colorado) - invited by IHF
- 4-year sunset ceremony residency (Villa Porta, Lake Maggiore)
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- Collab with Equanimous (Gravitas, 100M+ streams)

Setup: RAV Vast + voice + guitar + Ableton Push. One-man orchestra, fully live.

→ Full journey video (meditation → ecstatic): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rmnShcDsBBY
→ RAV meditation session (8K+ views): https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Available for trial dates.

Best,
FLUTUR

emails.subject: RAV Vast Artist - Guest Rotation / Sound Journey
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, a RAV Vast player creating 'ceremonial electronics' - live journeys from meditation to movement.

I noticed ED Rotterdam incorporates handpan in cooldown - the RAV Vast has deeper overtones, creating unique meditative textures. I'd love to contribute as guest rotation.

I can offer:
- Cooldown integration (15-20 min)
- Full journey arc: stillness → build → melodic deep → integration (45-60 min)

Credentials:
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE (invited by IHF)
- 4-year sunset ceremony residency
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- Equanimous collab (Gravitas, 100M+ streams)

→ Full journey (meditation → ecstatic): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rmnShcDsBBY
→ RAV meditation (8K+ views): https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Best,
FLUTUR

emails.subject: Sound Journey Facilitator - RAV Vast Ceremonies
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, a RAV Vast endorsed artist creating sound journeys for meditation, yoga, and ecstatic dance.

I discovered your monthly ED and Kirtan events - the woodland sanctuary setting resonates deeply with my work. For 4 years I created sunset ceremonies for luxury hotel guests.

I can offer:
- Sound journey for ED opening/cooldown
- Dedicated sound healing evening
- Yoga accompaniment with live RAV Vast + looping

Credentials:
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE
- Villa Porta - 4 years sunset ceremonies
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- Equanimous collab (Gravitas Recordings)

→ RAV meditation session (8K+ views): https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4
→ Full journey (stillness → movement): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rmnShcDsBBY

Warm regards,
FLUTUR
emails.note: Lead with Efthymia for pure wellness venue

emails.subject: Live Looping Sunset Sessions - Ceremonial Electronics
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, a live looping artist creating 'ceremonial electronics' - sunset journeys from world music meditation to organic melodic deep.

Kumharas' 30-year legacy of alternative cultures resonates with how I work. I create full arrangements solo, building layer by layer from RAV Vast meditation to driving rhythms.

Setup: RAV Vast + guitar + vocals + Ableton Push. One-man orchestra, 30-90 min.

Credentials:
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE (Aspen, Colorado)
- Opening for IHF at Denver (IHF: Coachella, Electric Forest, LiB)
- 4-year sunset residency (Villa Porta, Lake Maggiore)
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist

Available summer 2026.

→ Full journey (sunset → floor): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rmnShcDsBBY
→ RAV meditation (8K+ views): https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4

Best,
FLUTUR

emails.subject: Solo Live Act - Sunset Ceremonial Electronics
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, a solo live act creating 'ceremonial electronics' - sunset sessions from meditative RAV Vast to organic melodic grooves.

Sunset Ashram's artistic freedom philosophy resonates with me. I create full arrangements solo - surprise, diversity, freshness through live looping.

Setup: RAV Vast + guitar + vocals + Ableton Push.

Credentials:
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE
- Opening for IHF (Coachella, Electric Forest artist)

emails.subject: Live World Music for Sunset Sessions
emails.body:
Hello,

I'm FLUTUR, a live musician creating 'ceremonial electronics' - organic sunset sessions from world music meditation to melodic grooves.

Nalu's Riviera sunset vibe is where my music shines. I create full arrangements solo through live looping.

Setup: RAV Vast + guitar + vocals + Ableton Push. Ambient sunset or build to organic house.

Credentials:
- Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE (Colorado)
- Opening for IHF (Coachella, Electric Forest artist)
